title: Industrial Reborn
description: Industrial Reborn is a mod focused on providing an interesting experience by introducing new machinery, electric armor, tools, generators and more!
body:
## Industrial Reborn **THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY NOT MAINTAINED AS WE ARE NOW WORKING ON REWRITING IT**
If you want to support our work on the rewrite and want to play with friends, I highly recommend using Bisect Hosting. They provide amazing 24/7 support, fast response times and affordable prices! In fact, they even provided a discount code to get 25% off your first purchase. [![bisect_partnership_image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/b05f8205-98fb-4b14-9c55-d3d636aedd93.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/)
Industrial Reborn is a mod that adds machinery, generators and electric equipment to Minecraft. It is inspired by the popular Industrial Craft 2 but adds it's own changes, improvements and adjustments. ## FAQ Q: Will this get backported to version x? A: There will be no backports/updates for any version other than the latest Q: When will feature x be added? A: Eventually, perhaps. Note that this is not a direct port of ic2 but rather a reimagining Q: Can I convert IE into Forge Energy (FE or RF) A: No at least for now there is no way to do so but we might add something like that in the future (no promises) ## Warning: Reuploads on sites that are not curseforge/modrinth are not allowed and those reuploads may include malware. Be careful!
